scripts.build: cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=production astro check && cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=production astro build
scripts.build:production: cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=production astro check && cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=production astro build
scripts.build:preview: cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=preview astro check && cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=preview astro build
scripts.build:development: cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=development astro check && cross-env PUBLIC_DEPLOY_ENV=development astro build
scripts.test:smoke: node --import "data:text/javascript,import { register } from 'node:module'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; register('./scripts/ts-esm-loader.mjs', pathToFileURL('./'));" scripts/smoke-routes.ts
